name: Sgh Limited
analysis: SGH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$42.5900, stop A$39.6891, target A$47.3611 (1.64:1) — then trail it.
